## Summary of Changes
Explain **what** you changed.  
Include scope: roles, groups, assignments, workflows, Terraform modules, etc.

> Example: “Added a new AAD group for Product Analytics and updated RBAC assignments for the Analytics workspace.”

---

## Business Justification
Explain **why** this change is needed.  
Reference tickets, audits, onboarding/offboarding, compliance drivers, or application requirements.

> Example: “Required for new analytics service launch. SOC2 requirement to separate read-only and contributor access.”

---

## Impact & Risk Considerations
List anything reviewers should know:
- Affected users, apps, or environments  
- Potential access changes  
- Rollback impact  
- Any downtime or sequence required

---

## Supplementary Information
Add any supporting references that help reviewers validate the request:
- JIRA ticket(s)  
- SIT #  

---

## Checklist
- [ ] Summary of changes is complete  
- [ ] Business justification is included  
- [ ] Access deltas reviewed (add/remove/modify)  
- [ ] Terraform plan reviewed  
- [ ] No unintended privilege escalation  
- [ ] Rollback plan identified  
- [ ] All linting/CI checks pass
